message:
fix(health): prevent TOCTOU race in all mutating Storage methods

The previous implementation released the lock between Load() and Save(),
creating a race condition where concurrent modifications could be lost.

Changes:
- Add internal loadLocked() and saveLocked() methods
- Hold write lock for entire read-modify-write cycle in:
  - UpdateProfile
  - DeleteProfile
  - RecordError
  - ClearErrors
  - SetTokenExpiry
  - SetPlanType
  - DecayPenalties
